$comment: opus-mind prompt registry. Lists files that ARE prompts (audit targets), not files that talk ABOUT prompts. Docs in README, primitives/, techniques/, annotations/, methodology/, BUILD.md are NOT prompts — do not include them.

prompts.note: skill definition, self-gated to 6/6 before release
skeleton has instructional prose wrapped around the prompt body; expected to trip I4 on meta-text
intentional demo of a real, imperfect prompt — shipped as before state for teaching

calibration_files.note: This is our reverse-engineering source. We did NOT calibrate regexes by fitting to this file — we wrote regexes from the distilled principles in primitives/. A mismatch here is either (a) our regex is wrong, (b) source deviates from a principle we over-generalized. Both require human review. This is a calibration snapshot, not proof of imperfection.
